title: Kemi Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Kemi, with a Z-Score of -3.00. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Kemi are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 11.5 GG, indicating a high energy demand for heating. 
 The humidity is at 83% and the wind speed is at 7.6 km/h, making the cold even more unbearable.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
